visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a middle-aged man in a bright pink t-shirt and a checkered flat cap standing outside a modern mobile phone store. He gestures with high energy towards the camera, his facial expressions animated as he speaks. The storefront behind him features glass doors and 'miko' branding. (2) He turns and walks into the store, which is brightly lit with warm studio-style lighting. Inside, the shelves are stocked with various white mobile phone boxes. He stands in front of a counter where staff members are visible in the blurred background. (3) He holds up a vivo X300 smartphone, showing its large circular camera module with ZEISS branding in close-up. He demonstrates the phone's interface and uses his hands to emphasize its features. (4) The scene shifts to him presenting an OPPO Find X9 Pro box. He points at the large '9' on the packaging. He then holds an iPhone 16 Pro Max and points to a Casio calculator showing the number '25000', expressing surprise with wide eyes and a hand to his chin. (5) In the final phase, he holds both the vivo phone and the OPPO box side-by-side, standing in the center of the shop. He points downwards as the video ends, with digital text overlays filling the bottom of the frame.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c 有意思 Tim 哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko 米可手機館. [Subtitle]: 最近被問爆. (2) [Slogan]: # 選擇障礙必看. [Subtitle]: vivo X300 系列. (3) [Subtitle]: OPPO Find X9 系列. [Subtitle]: 到底要選誰? (4) [Subtitle]: 走! 我今天帶你們到. [Slogan]: # 我一生的摯愛. [Logo]: 米可手機館. (5) [Variety]: 3 個理由. [Subtitle]: 年底換機皇, 怎麼買最聰明? (跟我來). (6) [Variety]: 理由 1. [Slogan]: # 第一个就中?! [Subtitle]: 終結選擇困難. (7) [Subtitle]: 像這一台剛開賣的 vivo X300. (8) [Subtitle]: 看再多的開箱影片都不準. [Subtitle]: 你必須像我一樣! 來米可親手體驗. (9) [Subtitle]: 握過、拍過, 你才知道它有多強. (10) [Subtitle]: 那賣翻的 OPPO Find X9 系列. [Subtitle]: 很多人也在觀望. (11) [Variety]: 理由 2. [Subtitle]: 我這支舊手機 iPhone 16 Pro Max. (12) [Slogan]: # 確定沒多按一個 0. [Subtitle]: 25000元. (13) [Subtitle]: 米可的舊機回收真的是天花板等級. (14) [Subtitle]: 而且如果你還有搭配門號, 折扣更猛. (15) [Subtitle]: 東扣西扣, 換這兩支機皇, 根本是無痛升級. (16) [Variety]: 理由 3. [Subtitle]: 好康拿不完. (17) [Subtitle]: 兩台手機, 不論你最後是選 vivo X300 系列. (18) [Subtitle]: 或 OPPO Find X9 系列. [Subtitle]: 米可再加碼上市驚喜優惠. (19) [Slogan]: # CP 值超高. [Subtitle]: 價格保證滿意. (20) [Subtitle]: 想體驗 vivo X300 系列或想入手 OPPO Find X9 系列. (21) [Subtitle]: 來米可手機館就對了. [Subtitle]: 連結我放下方, 趕快去看.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 2 male staff members in the background, 1 female customer/staff member seated in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with short hair and glasses, wearing a brown checkered flat cap, a vibrant pink t-shirt with a Roots maple leaf logo, a yellow digital watch, and several beaded bracelets on his wrists.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial background is an urban street sidewalk in front of a glass storefront. The primary interior background is a modern, clean retail store with white shelves filled with product boxes, yellow and blue branding, and a customer service desk.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy male narration in Traditional Chinese, characterized by rapid speech and dynamic pitch variability. An upbeat, major-key electronic pop BGM runs continuously in the background. (2) At approximately 10 seconds, a 'whoosh' transition sound effect occurs. (3) A distinct 'ding' sound effect highlights the mention of 'Reason 1' at 12 seconds. The speaker's tone is persuasive and enthusiastic throughout this section. (4) Another 'whoosh' transition marks the shift to the second topic at 34 seconds. The BGM remains consistent in tempo (approx. 125 BPM) and volume level relative to the speech. (5) A third 'whoosh' transition occurs at 50 seconds. The speaker's arousal level remains high as he discusses trade-in pricing and shop promotions. (6) The video concludes with a final high-pitched 'pop' or sparkle sound effect as the speaker finishes his call to action and the BGM fades out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Intro -> Reason 1 (Experience) -> Reason 2 (Trade-in) -> Reason 3 (Bonus) -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the miko mobile phone store as the ideal place to purchase the vivo X300 and OPPO Find X9 series, leveraging hands-on experience, high trade-in values for old devices, and exclusive store incentives.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct recommendation of the retail store 'miko', showing store staff, and providing a link for further action.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly polished social media advertisement using an established tech influencer to drive retail foot traffic and sales for specific smartphone brands.
